0.text: Widespread areas of bronchiectasis in the left lower lobe

1.text: Appearance consistent with pneumonic consolidation in the mediobasal segment of the left lower lobe

2.text: Widespread centriacinar nodules in the left lower lobe parenchyma

3.text: Ground-glass and consolidation areas more prominent in both lungs, especially in the subpleural regions

4.text: Scattered fibrotic bands in both lungs
